description: Comprehensive Practice Worksheet Database for Limits. Includes Difference Quotient, Squeeze Theorem, One-Sided Asymptotes, and Unknown Parameter Continuity.

questions.question_text: Find the numerical value of the constant \( k \) that makes the limit exist: \( \lim_{x \to 1} \left(\frac{- k x + x^{2} + 2}{x - 1}\right) \)
Evaluate the limit: \( \lim_{h \to 0} \left(\frac{3 h + x^{2} - \left(h + x\right)^{2}}{h}\right) \)
Find the numerical value of the constant \( k \) that makes the limit exist: \( \lim_{x \to -2} \left(\frac{- k x + x^{2} - 2}{x + 2}\right) \)
Find the numerical value of the constant \( k \) that makes the limit exist: \( \lim_{x \to 2} \left(\frac{- k x + x^{2} + 2}{x - 2}\right) \)
Find the numerical value of the constant \( k \) that makes the limit exist: \( \lim_{x \to 2} \left(\frac{- k x + x^{2} + 6}{x - 2}\right) \)

Evaluate the limit: \( \lim_{h \to 0} \left(\frac{- 2 h + 3 x^{2} - 3 \left(h + x\right)^{2}}{h}\right) \)
